name: 80 Keys 75% Mechanical Keyboard, RGB Backlit Hotswap Wireless Keyboard Support Bluetooth/2.4G/Wire Connection, Gaming Keyboard with Cherry MX Silent Red Switches, PBT Keycaps and Volume Knob
shortName: 80 Keys 75% Mechanical Keyboard, RGB Backlit Hotswap Wireless
description: A 75% wireless mechanical gaming keyboard with hot-swap capability, cherry MX silent switches, and multi-connectivity for portable gaming.
